title: Power BI Data-Driven Alert Payload
description: JSON payload schema sent from Power BI to Power Automate when a data-driven alert is triggered.

type.description: The event type. Always 'alert' for data-driven alerts.

alertTitle.description: The title of the alert as configured in Power BI.

dashboardName.description: The name of the Power BI dashboard where the alert was created.

cardName.description: The name of the pinned visual that triggered the alert.

metricName.description: The display name of the metric being monitored.

metricValue.description: The actual value of the metric at the time the alert fired.

threshold.description: The threshold value configured for the alert.

direction.description: The comparison direction of the alert condition.

url.description: Deep link URL back to the Power BI report for one-click investigation.

dashboardId.description: The unique identifier of the Power BI dashboard.

occurred.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the alert was triggered.
